docs.name: Horizontal Scroll Gallery
docs.description: Converts vertical scroll into horizontal movement with momentum physics for immersive galleries.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of React nodes (e.g. images, cards) to map across the horizontal track.

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction the track moves when the user scrolls down.

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: Common classes applied to every individual container.

docs.overview: HorizontalScrollGallery converts vertical scroll into a smooth horizontal pan across a row of items, driven by a spring-dampened progress value. The gallery pins to the viewport for the full scroll distance.

scenarios.title: Portfolio project showcase
scenarios.description: Lay out project images in a wide horizontal strip that users pan through by scrolling.

scenarios.title: Feature card reel
scenarios.description: Scroll through a reel of feature cards, each revealing itself as the user pans right.
